title: Cross-source org/effort dedup workflow (human-confirmed, reversible)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Cross-source duplicates must be resolved on canonical IDs with a precision-tuned, human-confirmed, reversible workflow.
objective: Build a cross-source org/effort dedup workflow anchored on canonical IDs plus blocking keys, with human-confirmed, reversible, provenance-preserving merges.
acceptanceCriteria: Cross-source duplicates anchored on canonical IDs (ROR/Funder Registry/NCT/DOI) plus blocking keys; matcher tuned for precision over recall.
No automatic merge ships without human confirmation; merges reversible and provenance-preserving.
Zero confirmed false merges in the dedup audit sample.
output: tools/dedup/ cross-source dedup workflow, committed via PR.
